text: 'Local Video Editing' is officially dead 🤯 VideoSOS runs 100+ AI models in browser — no downloads, no install, no cloud. 100% Open Source.
Vector databases just got replaced by MP4 files 🤯 Memvid stores 1M text chunks inside video frames — 10x smaller than JSON, works offline, no server needed. 100% Open Source.
ElevenLabs just lost its moat 🤯 Voicebox clones your voice from a 3-second clip, runs 100% locally on your machine. No cloud, no API key, no subscription. 100% Open Source.
This tool REMOVES LLM CENSORSHIP in 45 minutes 🤯 Heretic permanently deletes the model's refusal ability — no jailbreaks, no prompts. Just fine-tune it out. 100% Open Source.
